examples: She puts it on, ties a saffron-colored kerchief round her neck, and then the gown looks whiter.
Herr kerchief is dirty with oil.
She wore on her head a yellow kerchief.
He took to wearing a kerchief and giving his lips a hasty wipe after every meal.
Clad in white, with a red kerchief, tourists and Spaniards sprint ahead of the charging bulls, which face matadors in the bullring later in the day.
